finalJeopardy.clue: This media franchise became the highest-grossing franchise in history despite beginning as a pair of Game Boy games released in 1996.

questions.clue: This Gotham City vigilante fights crime with no superpowers, relying instead on gadgets, training, and detective skills.
Superman's Fortress of Solitude is traditionally located in this region of the Earth.
This villain was once a psychiatrist at Arkham Asylum before becoming one of Batman's greatest enemies.
This Green Lantern from Earth was chosen to succeed Abin Sur after the Lantern crashed on Earth.
This Anti-Monitor-created event from 1985 was designed to simplify DC's increasingly complex multiverse.
This British artist created the albums ÷ (Divide), × (Multiply), and + (Plus).
Born Stefani Germanotta, this artist is known for hits including "Poker Face" and "Bad Romance".
This Canadian artist released the albums After Hours and Dawn FM under a stage name.
This rapper became the first solo artist to win the Pulitzer Prize for Music.
Known for her alter ego Sasha Fierce, this artist became the most-awarded artist in Grammy history in 2023.
This law states that what goes up must come down due to the force that keeps us on Earth.
This law states that for every action, there is an equal and opposite reaction.
This law states that energy cannot be created or destroyed, only transformed from one form to another.
questions.answer: The Law of Conservation of Energy

questions.clue: This law states that the pressure of a gas decreases as its volume increases, provided temperature remains constant.
This law states that the current through a conductor is directly proportional to the voltage across it and inversely proportional to its resistance.
In Poker, this hand ranks above a Full House but below a Royal Flush.
In Pokémon TCG, this card type is attached to Pokémon to allow them to use attacks.
In Yu-Gi-Oh!, Exodia can instantly win the duel if a player has all five of these in their hand.
In Magic: The Gathering, these cards represent the primary resource used to cast most spells.
In Cards Against Humanity, one player each round serves in this role, selecting the winning response.
This Australian spread made from brewer's yeast is famously loved by locals and hated by many tourists.
This traditional Scottish dish combines sheep's heart, liver, and lungs with oats and spices inside a sheep's stomach.
Often considered one of the world's smelliest foods, this Swedish delicacy consists of fermented Baltic herring.
This Icelandic dish consists of fermented Greenland shark that is buried and cured for months before being eaten.
This Filipino delicacy is a fertilized duck egg containing a partially developed embryo.
This company created the iPhone.
This city is known as the City of Canals.
This planet has the most moons in the Solar System.
This Shakespeare play features the characters Rosencrantz and Guildenstern.
This scientist's 1905 papers earned the nickname "Annus Mirabilis" or "Miracle Year."
Located in Egypt, this ancient wonder is the only one of the original Seven Wonders still standing today.
This wonder in India was built by Emperor Shah Jahan as a mausoleum for his wife Mumtaz Mahal.
The ancient city of Petra, famous for structures carved into rose-colored rock, is located in this modern-day country.
Standing on the Greek island of Rhodes, this ancient wonder was a giant bronze statue of this sun god.
Destroyed by earthquakes and finally abandoned in antiquity, this wonder was a massive temple dedicated to the goddess Artemis in this city.
Some fans argue this long-running sitcom should have ended several seasons earlier, rather than continuing after Michael Scott left.
Many gamers claim this open-world RPG is great despite players spending more time installing mods than actually playing it.
Some food critics argue this fruit ruins any pizza it touches.
A common movie hot take is that this Star Wars film is either one of the franchise's best entries or its absolute worst.
One of the internet's most persistent gaming hot takes is that this 2016 Game of the Year winner didn't deserve the award over Doom or Uncharted 4.
This term refers to an irrational fear of long words.
This condition causes sufferers to believe they are secretly a werewolf.
This syndrome causes people to believe they are dead, missing organs, or no longer exist.
This condition causes people to compulsively collect garden gnomes.
This syndrome causes people to believe familiar people have been replaced by identical imposters.
Lunatic enslaves chocolate-making entertainers and slowly kills children in front of their parents.

questions.answer: Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows

finalJeopardy.clue: This game's final boss is named Ganon, but the title refers to the princess players are trying to save.
finalJeopardy.answer: What is The Legend of Zelda?
